relevant_work.job_desc:
• Manage Back Office applications and international business software solutions to support operational efficiency.

• Design, develop, test, and maintain Microservices on OpenShift and monolithic applications on Oracle WebLogic.

• Build and maintain batch applications, improving system design, scalability, and performance.

• Develop automation testing with Katalon to enhance product reliability.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to optimize user experience and streamline workflows.

• Identify and resolve technical issues while ensuring stable operations across business units.

• Conduct code reviews and contribute to Agile SDLC processes.

• Tech Stack: Spring Boot, Spring Batch, Angular, Node.js, Oracle DB, MySQL, OpenShift, WebLogic, SWIFT Alliance, Windows Batch Scripting.

• Tools: Katalon, Power Automate, GitLab, Jenkins, Control-M, Postman, MobaXterm, VS Code, IntelliJ IDEA, Eclipse, Apache JMeter.

Career Path Highlights:

• Application Developer (6 months): Built web apps using Java, Spring Boot, and Angular; contributed to monolithic architecture projects.

• Service Quality Inspector (2+ years): Performed white-box and black-box testing (performance testing), load testing, managed UAT, and maintained test documentation.

• SWIFT Alliance Engineer (6 months): Handled system implementation, maintenance, troubleshooting, and performance optimization while ensuring compliance and supporting audits.

• Conduct in-depth analysis, customization, and troubleshooting of Oracle Flexcube for Core Banking Systems, ensuring seamless banking operations.
  • Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices using Java and Spring Boot to support scalable and efficient backend systems.
  • Write and optimize PL/SQL scripts for data analysis, migration, and report generation, ensuring data integrity and performance.
  • Maintain and optimize Oracle databases, implementing best practices for query performance, indexing, and data security.
  • Develop secure authentication and authorization mechanisms using JWT, OAuth2, and Spring Security.
  • Analyze and resolve technical issues related to Oracle Flexcube, data migration, and backend services at EximBank.
  • Cross-functional Collaboration with business analysts, developers, and stakeholders to gather requirements and design effective technical solutions.
  • Ensure backend architectures are scalable and integrate seamlessly with third-party services and enterprise applications.

relevant_work.job_desc:
1. Mengembangkan sistem MES (Manufacturing Execution System) lengkap untuk produksi, meliputi Work Order, monitoring mesin, tracking OEE, dan manajemen stok bahan baku, menggunakan ASP.NET, SQL Server, dan Bootstrap.
  2. Membantu team dalam menambahkan mesin dan mengintegrasikan data PLC melalui Aveva Edge/InduSoft Web Studio ke Dashboard Monitoring OEE Realtime.
  3. Mengimplementasikan pengumpulan data IoT dan integrasi perangkat menggunakan platform Rootcloud IoT.
  4. Membangun ulang dan mengoptimalkan dashboard monitoring lama berbasis Aveva Edge menjadi web-based dashboard menggunakan Python, Django, dan RESTful API.
  5. Melakukan troubleshooting sistem, perbaikan bug, dan optimasi kinerja untuk memastikan keandalan sistem produksi.
  6. Terlibat dalam wiring panel OEE, pembuatan Andon Button, dan penghubungan panel OEE ke HMI Beckhof

relevant_work.job_desc:
Operated as a Software Engineer, specializing in full-stack development using a Next.js (front-end) and NestJS (back-end) architecture.


- Successfully translated complex UI/UX wireframes into responsive, high-performance web applications using Next.js for server-side rendering and a seamless user experience.

- Engineered the back-end services using NestJS, integrating a headless CMS to empower non-technical users to manage all dynamic website content.

• Worked with deadlines and handled high-volume content production consistently

● Designed and implemented an integrated financial reporting system, leveraging Cloudera as the primary platform.

● Built and maintained data validation rules using Python, PySpark, IBM DataStage, and Shell scripting, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and consistency of incoming financial data.

● Managed large-scale data pipelines and storage across Parquet, Kudu, Hive, and HBase, optimizing reliability and accessibility for regulatory reporting.

● Spearheaded and executed over large-scale stress tests, sanity checks, and production-to-DR server switchovers

● Engineered and implemented robust data cleaning and normalization processes in SQL queries significantly improving database performance by 50% in query runtime.

relevant_work.job_desc: ● Planning, designing, and examining the implementation of network upgrades or new deployments for the network infrastructure of an organization including the installation, configuration, and maintenance of network devices like routers, switches, firewalls, and wireless access points until working smoothly. ● Calculating and determine the users of the organization in the future around 5 years – 10 years ● Enumerate and understand the various applications utilized within the organization to inform network design and equipment selection. ● Rigorously evaluate network equipment (e.g., routers, switches, firewalls, wireless access points, servers, cabling) based on technical specifications, performance metrics, scalability, security features, compatibility, and vendor support. ● Crucially, assess equipment based on industry best practices and a comprehensive analysis of its electricity consumption, aiming for energy-efficient solutions without compromising performance. ● Prepare comprehensive and detailed reports and presentations outlining equipment options, including their technical specifications, cost implications, and a clear justification for recommendations, all directly related to the organization's current and future needs. ● Maintain comprehensive and up-to-date documentation of network equipment inventory, configurations, and technical specifications to ensure accurate record-keeping and facilitate future operations. ● Assist in the initial setup and configuration of new network devices, ensuring they are integrated seamlessly into the existing infrastructure. ● Actively participate in team meetings and contribute valuable insights to network strategy discussions, helping to shape the future direction of the organization's network.

relevant_work.job_desc:
• Mengembangkan dan memelihara sistem pajak daerah berbasis web yang digunakan oleh 150+ pemerintah daerah di indonesia.
  • Mengimplementasikan fitur-fitur baru berdasarkan kebutuhan spesifik klien (pemerintah daerah) serta memastikan sistem berjalan efisien dan bebas bug melalui proses bug fixing dan optimasi performa.
  • Mengintegrasikan aplikasi dengan sistem internal dan pihak eksternal seperti bank daerah untuk mendukung transaksi perpajakan melalui Virtual Account (VA) dan QRIS.
  • Membangun dan mengembangkan alat kiosk untuk pengecekan tagihan pajak secara mandiri oleh masyarakat, terintegrasi langsung dengan sistem Bapenda.
  • Mengelola pengembangan dan pemeliharaan berbagai aplikasi layanan publik digital seperti e-SPPT, PPAT Online, serta pengecekan tagihan PBB, PAD, dan BPHTB berbasis web.
  • Melakukan integrasi terbatas dengan core system perpajakan untuk kebutuhan sinkronisasi dan konsistensi data antar sistem.
  • Membangun, mendokumentasikan, dan mengelola RESTful API backend untuk mendukung pertukaran data antar aplikasi publik, sistem internal, dan pihak ketiga secara aman dan terstruktur.

relevant_work.job_desc:
• Built a high-throughput CSV upload system for tier configuration, enabling non-technical teams to upload 400+ tiers (~21,000+ entries) in

under 4 seconds, significantly improving operational efficiency and eliminating manual workflows.

• Optimized a performance-critical SQL query, reducing read cost by 56.6% and total query cost by 14.8%, leading to faster response times and lower database load across the platform.

• Developed accident and flood validation logic for vehicle inspection in the Loan Origination System (LOS), integrating multi-source data checks and improving risk assessment workflows.

• Enhanced existing OPI Tools by refactoring discount logic, increasing disbursement values and contributing directly to company revenue uplift.

• Contributed to multiple backend services in a microservice architecture using ExpressJS, Fastify, Kafka, and Redis, enabling decoupled data flows and improving system scalability.

• Developed and integrated a new ReactJS-based user interface within a micro frontend architecture, enhancing user interaction and system usability.

• Integrated third-party tools like PandaDoc and DocuSign, debugging API issues and contributing internal documentation with Docusaurus, while also supporting Product teams via dashboards on Metabase.

•Supported product and QA teams by debugging live issues via Grafana and managing staging deployments with Jenkins, reducing turnaround time for testing and releases.

Developed SQI Platform, an internal all-in-one web application adopted by 30+ employees, resulting in a 25% faster documentation and
deployment workflow.
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins & GitLab, reducing deployment errors by 40% and cutting release time from hours to
minutes.
• Conducted software testing with JMeter & Selenium IDE, identifying and resolving 15+ performance issues before release.
• Contributed to the visual identity of the platform by designing a mascot and UI elements, enhancing usability and engagement.
• Recognized as Intern of the Month for outstanding performance and contribution to the AI&SQI Division.

relevant_work.job_desc:
As a Software Engineer, my main responsibilities is :


- Frontend & Backend Development: Developing and maintaining web application features, both on the frontend using ReactJs and backend using Java Spring boot

- System Analysis: Collaborating with the team to analyze system requirements and design appropriate solutions.

- UI/UX Design: Participating in the user interface and user experience (UI/UX) design process to ensure that the applications are user-friendly and intuitive.

- API Integration: Integrating APIs into the frontend to ensure seamless communication between the frontend and backend systems.

- Team Collaboration: Working closely with various divisions within the team, including analysts.

- Technical Bootcamp: Participated in an intensive 3-month technical bootcamp at the beginning of the program, focused on mastering software development tools, frameworks, and best practices before joining the project team.

relevant_work.job_desc:
● Participated in a backend team of 4 members to build an attendance backend system using Nest.js (Node.js framework).

● Developed accurate presence location validation logic by implementing Haversine Formula to calculate the distance between user coordinates and authorized office locations.

● Create comprehensive unit tests using the Jest framework to ensure reliability, stability, and code coverage on critical business logic.

● Help design and implement RESTful API endpoints for integration of attendance system with frontend applications and databases (PostgreSQL with Prisma).

relevant_work.job_desc:
1. Modernized a legacy HR platform by rebuilding a monolithic architecture into distributed microservices using Python, TypeScript (NestJS), and PHP, while simultaneously engineering a high-performance Flutter mobile application to support 4,000+ active users.
  2. Reduced HR operational processing time by 50% by engineering 50+ automated Apache Airflow workflows to synchronize data between HRIS, Oracle EBS, and external third-party services.
  3. Architected a unified mobile experience by independently developing a Flutter-based application, integrating 13+ internal systems via a centralized API gateway (OpenAPI/Swagger) to ensure real-time data consistency.
  4. Accelerated IT decision-making by 40% by creating a RAG-based prioritization engine proof-of-concept using n8n workflows, LLMs, and PostgreSQL to automate change request analysis.

relevant_work.job_desc:
• Architected the modernization of the Saldomu e-money application (Native Android), refactoring legacy code into a scalable Clean Architecture (MVVM). This reduced technical debt, enabled comprehensive Unit Testing, and improved app stability.
  • Engineered the Cash Management System (CMS) ecosystem, acting as a Full-Stack Engineer to build the Back-Office (Java Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, Oracle) and Front-Office (Vue.js) platforms.
  • Fortified application security by implementing OWASP Mobile Top 10 standards, including certificate pinning, root detection, and NDK-based key storage, successfully passing rigorous external Penetration Tests with zero critical findings.
  • Optimized the development lifecycle by conducting rigorous code reviews, enforcing Clean Architecture (MVVM/MVC), and driving knowledge sharing sessions to elevate team capabilities.
  • Collaborated with the Infrastructure team to streamline deployment processes, utilizing CI/CD pipelines to ensure rapid and reliable delivery of features for both Mobile and CMS platforms.

relevant_work.job_desc:
Designed and implemented an automated system to monitor platform health and status, capturing critical metrics such as uptime, response time, and system availability, and database sequence tablespace.


Contributed to continuous improvement initiatives by suggesting system enhancements and helping optimize message routing, service orchestration, and error handling within the SOA framework Software AG Webmethod (JAVA).


Ensured all EAI/SOA platforms and services maintained at least 98% availability through monitoring Elasticsearch and regular health checks AppDynamic.


Acted as second-level support, assisting the customer support team in analyzing and resolving transaction issues and integration failures promptly, and ensuring that transactions 99% successful.


Conducted hourly system checkpoints to verify service status, identify anomalies, and initiate corrective actions.

• Learned the end-to-end process of app development, from ideation, research, and solution generation to design, testing, and implementation. Gained experience in defining team roles, responsibilities, and cross-functional collaboration to build user-centered applications.
  • Strengthened engineering skills in Swift and SwiftUI by applying clean code principles, modular architecture, and efficient debugging practices across three projects: Jaka (calorie intake monitoring app), Emoci (AI-integrated journaling app), and Vocality (vocal training app), where I served as the developer.
  • Developed a strong foundation in UI/UX design principles with a user-centered approach, including user journey mapping, user insights gathering, and usability testing. Translated research findings into low-, mid-, and high-fidelity prototypes, and implemented them into coded UI. Served as UI/UX Designer in three projects: Comano (public speaking training app), Vocality (vocal training app), and Tidy-Up with Miko (children’s educational game).

• Contributed to the development of three core institutional systems: SIAM (student academic information system), SIAKAD Master (academic

and administrative management system), and MyITN (centralized Single Sign-On platform).

• Built and maintained scalable frontend architectures using Next.js and React to support complex operational flows for students, faculty

members, and university administrators.

• Implemented secure authentication mechanisms including Google OAuth integration, email-based recovery, multi-step verification, and

Redis-based session caching to enhance system reliability and performance.

• Engineered reusable component structures from complex Figma designs, establishing consistent UI patterns across interconnected

applications.

• Optimized server-state management using TanStack Query to improve data synchronization and minimize redundant API requests.

• Collaborated closely with stakeholders and backend engineers to translate multifaceted institutional requirements into stable, production-

ready web interfaces.

relevant_work.job_desc:
1. Engineered the backend logic for the BLTS (Bantuan Langsung Tunai) module entirely within SQL Server, Laravel, ReactJS, utilizing Stored Procedures and optimized queries to handle massive transaction volumes.
  2. Implemented automated data matching workflows (Pemadanan Data) using Laravel Scheduler (Cron Jobs) to synchronize millions of records between DTSEN and external datasets.
  3. Resolved critical performance bottlenecks in Pemadanan DTSEN Module, specifically database deadlocks and timeouts, by refactoring legacy SQL queries. This optimization resulted in a 60% reduction in query execution time and eliminated process failures during peak loads.

relevant_work.job_desc:
• Analyzed and developed web applications based on business requirements. 

• Responsible for developing and maintaining web and mobile applications using modern full stack technologies such 

Next Js, Flutter, React Native, dan Expo. 

• Designing and developing databases using Supabase, PostgreSQL, Firebase, and some required database systems. 

• Design and implement frontend interfaces and backend APIs to ensure seamless integration and high performance. 

• Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues across the entire application stack to ensure stability and 

scalability. 

• Collaborate closely with UI/UX designers, backend engineers, and mobile teams to deliver responsive, user-friendly, 

and feature-rich applications. 

• Participate in code reviews, deployment processes, and continuous improvement of development workflows using 

CI/CD and version control systems.

• Regional Banking Expansion (Singapore): Led the backend delivery for a cross-border customer onboarding module using Java Spring Boot and Netflix Eureka. Managed critical data handoffs between modern microservices and legacy core banking downstreams via REST APIs.
  • Custom CRM Architecture: Architected a “Salesforce-alternative” dashboard using Node.js and React. Engi neered a temporal data aggregation engine to solve complex N+1 reporting issues, ensuring accurate KPI attribution. • Performance Engineering: Optimized high-volume query endpoints, reducing API latency from 7s to <100ms by implementing advanced SQL indexing and query restructuring, meeting strict banking Operational Excellence (OE) standards.
  • Event-Driven Architecture: Built a high-throughput distribution system using Kafka to route sales leads asyn chronously, decoupling the ingestion layer from the processing logic.
  • QA Leadership: Directed System Integration Testing (SIT) cycles, designing comprehensive test scenarios to ensure zero-defect deployment for high-compliance banking products.

relevant_work.job_desc: I developed an E-Commerce Manager platform (mobile app and backend) to integrate and manage online stores, initially supporting TikTok Shop and designed to scale to other marketplaces. I built the mobile application using Flutter for managing products, orders, chats, and dashboards, and implemented the backend using Node.js (Express, Sequelize) with MySQL for API services and data management. I also integrated the store authentication flow with secure token handling for marketplace APIs, developed core features such as product CRUD, order processing (view, update, reject), and a customer chat system, and designed a modular architecture to support future integrations (e.g., Shopee and other marketplaces). Additionally, I implemented REST API integrations with external marketplace services to synchronize product and order data.

relevant_work.job_desc:
Developed, enhanced, and maintained existing backend systems while delivering new features across multiple client projects


Performed performance optimization, bug fixin¬g, and troubleshooting to ensure system stability and responsive application behavior.


Conducted unit testing and manual regression testing to validate feature correctness and reduce recurring issues.


Translated product and business requirements into clear technical actions and backend implementations.


Took ownership of feature lifecycles, including development, testing, production deployment, UAT support, and subsequent improvements.


Collaborated with senior engineers and business teams to determine appropriate technical approaches and backend architecture.


Maintained basic technical documentation per project, tracking feature progress and active development tickets for project managers.


Expanded technical capabilities by learning and applying system and DevOps fundamentals such as virtual machines, networking, DNS, gateway configuration, secure port management, and containerized development environments.

• Built a web-based system to manage Work Orders, Technical Records, Spare Parts stock, and Invoices.
  • Implemented automated pricing, stock deduction/restoration, and status-based validation.
  • Developed dynamic forms and modal workflows for creating, cancelling, and confirming orders.
  • Designed UI/UX for a responsive and user-friendly workflow in managing Work Orders, Technical Records, and Invoices.
  • Utilized: Laravel, PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap

Collaborated with a two-person team to develop a tailored digital library platform for SMK Bhakti Mulya 400, integrating client-provided UI assets with an existing database. Delivered end-to-end features with a focus on usability, performance, and cross-device accessibility.

⦁ Designed and implemented a scalable CMS in Laravel + Livewire to simplify book and content management.

⦁ Enhanced content discoverability with advanced search and filtering using jQuery.

⦁ Built a responsive interface with Bootstrap, ensuring smooth access on mobile, tablet, and desktop.

⦁ Reduced page load times through optimized backend–frontend integration.

⦁ Developed search functionality with jQuery and comprehensive filtering features, enabling efficient book discovery for users

⦁ Implemented user interface according to client designs using Bootstrap, ensuring consistent display quality across all devices

⦁ Handled backend-frontend integration and comprehensive system performance optimization

relevant_work.job_desc:
1. Enhanced seller platform user experience and functionality using React and Redux, driving higher engagement and usability.
  2. Strengthened application security by optimizing Dockerization and reducing platform vulnerabilities.
  3. Initiated the V3 and V4 seller platform by building a robust and scalable frontend boilerplate.
  4. Implemented Test-Driven Development (TDD) practices, achieving 98% test coverage with a 100% pass rate for Renos UI.
  5. Improved codebase reliability by eliminating 300+ warnings and potential issues across libraries and application layers.
  6. Introduced and standardized Git workflow practices, improving development velocity and cross-team collaboration.
  7. Led a frontend team of 6 engineers to build and deliver Renos UI within a 1.5-month timeline, applying standardized architecture, automated testing, and rigorous code review processes.
  8. Architected, maintained, and published Renos UI as a public NPM package with automated versioning and CI-based auto-deployment.
  9. Conducted continuous code reviews and mentoring, fostering a strong engineering culture and high code quality standards.
  10. Contributed to regional frontend projects with lean teams and aggressive delivery timelines, focusing on modular design, performance, and maintainability.

• Built and supported enterprise web/mobile applications serving thousands of users, using Laravel, Next.js, Flutter, and

• Designed scalable software architectures and databases, integrating multi-module ERP systems across sales, logistics,

manufacturing, HR, and finance, with automated validation, reconciliation, and event-driven cross-system

synchronization.

• Owned the analysis of operational business processes and financial workflows, translating them into reliable system

solutions used in production.

• Managed deployments on Linux servers (Nginx/Apache) and maintained version control pipelines via GitLab/GitHub.

• Led end-to-end delivery activities including requirement workshops, sprint planning, UAT cycles, rollout, and user

onboarding, ensuring alignment across business stakeholders and engineering teams.

• Acted as the communication bridge between business users and developers, ensuring clarity, feasibility, and smooth

delivery throughout the project lifecycle.

Factor Authentication (MFA) solution, securing high-value transactions and

eliminating the need for traditional password-based logins


Migrated services from Java 11 to Java 21 and spring boot 2 to spring boot 3


Created multi-channel notification systems, including email, Microsoft Teams, and

in-app alerts, used across multiple services


Implemented the integration of the Camunda BPMN engine for the Loan lifecycle

project, providing real-time visibility into workflow statuses for business and

management

relevant_work.job_desc: As a backend engineer at KlikIndomaret, I contributed across two major platform teams, delivering large-scale system modernization and high-impact feature development. In the Notification Team (Java), I rebuilt the legacy C# notification system into a Java Spring Boot microservices architecture, implementing Kafka pipelines for high-volume asynchronous events and managing Kubernetes workloads through Lens to ensure stability and observability. I integrated FCM for both mass and targeted push notifications and engineered a robust bulk-blast system supporting campaigns of up to 7 million recipients, complete with batching, throttling, retry logic, and improved end-to-end monitoring for latency and throughput. Additionally, I developed the Saybread web application by adapting and extending the architecture of Point Coffee Gedhe. Earlier, on the Scheduler Team (C#), I modernized the legacy ASP.NET platform to ASP.NET Core, built modular REST APIs serving Klik, Food, Virtual, Travel, and Ticket services, and maintained the Scheduler Prodmas system that synchronizes store and stock data across regional clusters. I optimized Prodmas processing time from 3–5 hours to about 2 hours, delivered promotional features such as Harbolnas that helped drive a 30% revenue increase, resolved more than 50 production issues, and collaborated with partner teams to integrate complex business logic and external services.

relevant_work.job_desc:
• Engineered a unified Talent Management System by merging "Facecard" (Employee Profiling) and "IDP" (Individual Development Plan) into a cohesive web-based platform, enabling data-driven decision-making for organizational development. Developed full-stack modules using Laravel (PHP) and MySQL, creating features for Talent Status, Matrix Simulation, and Competency Assessment.
  • Spearheaded the System Integration with Darwinbox (HRIS), successfully connecting local modules queries via DBeaver with the enterprise environment.
  • Implemented Data Migration features, allowing seamless bulk data import from Excel to the database to streamline administrative workflows.
  • Conducted Business Analysis for the HCIS Remapping Project; drafted Business Requirement Documents (BRD), mapped database structures, and performed gap analysis for vendor implementation.
  • Designed high-fidelity wireframes and process flows in Figma, optimizing UI/UX for internal users, and led the User Acceptance Testing (UAT) phase to validate system performance and logic.
  • Tech Stack : Laravel, Blade Template, JavaScript, CSS, MySQL, DBeaver, Darwinbox API, Figma, Excel (Data Import).

relevant_work.job_desc:
Tech Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, React Query, Styled Components, SCSS, Flutter, Firebase, Webpack

  • Revamped Renos.id (e-commerce) web buyer platform from cluttered legacy code to modern frontend technology like Next.js, improving developer experience, maintainability, and web performance. 
  • Designed folder structure, code patterns, layouts, boilerplates, and CI/CD workflows, accelerating developer onboarding.
  • Worked across the full buyer-side experience in the marketplace ecosystem, delivering features across product listing, product detail pages, promotions, chat, cart, wishlist, checkout, shipping, payment integration, and invoice generation.
  • Code reviewing peers’ Pull Requests, providing constructive feedback, sharing knowledge, ensuring code quality, and reducing post-release bugs.
  • Work closely with the marketing team to integrate marketing tools, including Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager, Braze, and MoEngage, to enhance sales tracking and user engagement.
  • Optimized SEO and web performance by implementing best practices in performance optimization, such as SSR, lazy loading, caching, and code splitting, resulting in better page load times and higher search engine visibility.
  • Contributed to the mobile app development using Flutter with Riverpod.
  • Developed a comprehensive Design System featuring reusable components to ensure a consistent user interface across multiple platforms (e.g., seller, buyer, backoffice).

• Developed the CSIRT (Computer Security Incident Response Team) website using WordPress → csirt.mind.id.

• Created and updated the user manual for e-sign usage across ICT teams.
• Assisted in preparing PowerPoint presentations for e-sign project reports to division heads.
• Involved in pre-procurement processes and User Acceptance Testing (UAT) for various IT projects.
• Provided technical support for SAP accounts to holding members.
• Assisted in requirement gathering documentation for multiple IT projects.

relevant_work.job_desc:
* Led frontend development of wawancara.ai.

* Built a frontend interview interface that orchestrates user voice input, asynchronous AI response handling, and seamless UI updates, delivering a smooth experience across 30,000+ interview sessions.

* Implemented user voice input handling and auto-recording using the MediaStream API and Hark.js.

* Developed anti-fraud mechanisms using the MediaStream API and Canvas API, capturing periodic screenshots for monitoring.

* Optimized Base Table component re-renders using useCallback and useMemo, reducing unnecessary render cycles by from 30 to 14 (~53%) as measured in React Profiler.

* Reduced duplicate API requests in Recruiter Dashboard by implementing in-flight request deduplication in GraphQL calls, cutting redundant request from 4 to 1 (75% reduction).

* Built drag-and-drop interactions using dnd-kit to improve user experience.

* Implement complex form validation including Field Array and Dependent Field.

* Rebuilt the project using Vite and initiated a migration to a Feature-Driven Architecture, improving scalability and long-term maintainability.

* Implemented Mixpanel analytics to monitor and analyze user behavior.

* Integrated with both REST API and GraphQL backend.

* Designed and implemented reusable transactional email templates for multiple user flows, including account verification, password recovery, and company member invitations.


𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗴𝗶𝗲𝘀: React, React Profiler, dnd-kit, Formik, Redux, GraphQL, Mixpanel

relevant_work.job_desc:
Portal Qwords, Tech Stack: WHMCS, Bootstrap, PHP Native, JavaScript Native

  • UI/UX Development: Optimized UI/UX design for key features such as Domain Sale, Domain Rental, and Domain Backorder, implementing responsive layouts and modern visual elements,
  • Domain Auction Page Transformation: Led enhancements on the Domain Auction page with new feature integrations and visual refinements to enhance user experience,
  • Redesign of Backorder Domain Auction Page: Directed the overhaul of the Backorder Domain Auction page, aligning it with corporate branding and improving readability,
  • Responsiveness Optimization: Ensured page responsiveness for both desktop and mobile views, optimizing functionality across all devices,
  • Testing and Debugging: Conducted thorough testing and debugging to ensure high performance and reliability of implemented feature,
  • Enhancement of Domain Sale and Rental Features: Simplified Domain Sale and Rental features and aligned them with corporate branding for a better user experience,
  • Implementation of Modern Design: Led the implementation of modern design on domain search and filter features, enhancing display efficiency and aesthetics,
  • Development of Domain Payment Pages: Managed the development of domain payment pages, ensuring seamless integration with backend systems and transaction security,
  • Countdown Enhancement: Created visually appealing countdown timers for auctions and improved display of start and end times, enhancing user engagement and interaction,
  • Resolved bugs and issues related to WordPress and various plugins to ensure a smooth and error-free user experience.


Portal Irsfa, Tech Stack: React, Next.js, SASS, Laravel, Node.js

  • Reverse Engineering and Documentation: Comprehensive reverse engineering of databases and frontend systems, producing detailed diagrams for improved system understanding and effective issue resolution,
  • DNS Manager Development: Enhanced the DNS Manager interface with table, search, pagination, and sorting features to improve user interaction,
  • Thorough Testing and Debugging: Carefully tested and debugged DNS Manager functionalities to ensure strong performance and reliability,
  • Critical Issue Resolution: Identified and resolved critical database issues, maintaining overall application stability and performance,
  • API and Front-end Integration: Integrated IRSFA-API and IRSFA-React for seamless operations and efficient user access,
  • Development of DNS Monitoring Features: Managed the development of DNS monitoring and notification features, providing users with real-time updates on their domain statuses.


Qwords.com, Tech Stack: WordPress, MySQL, Bootstrap

  • Landing Page Development: Played a key role in developing and optimizing landing pages using Divi templates, enhancing visual appeal and user engagement,
  • Navigation and UI Enhancement: Simplified routine menu items and refined UI elements for better consistency and user experience,
  • Product Content Management: Managed the development of product information pages, ensuring clear and compelling content for users.

relevant_work.job_desc:
• Developed an AI-powered material shortage detection system using YOLOv11, Grounded-SAM, and SAM-CLIP, achieving mAP > 0.9 across an augmented dataset of 1,500+ annotated images in Roboflow.
  • Built an IoT-based RF Gun scanner to track trolley and busbar movements, improving real-time material visibility and reducing assembly delays.
  • Developed a cross-platform Flutter application with a Go + PostgreSQL backend to digitize panel tracking and issue reporting, enabling live monitoring, push notifications, SMTP, and in-app status updates.
  • Supported Tableau dashboard analytics for the OneMM platform and assisted in purchase order automation for supply chain operations.

relevant_work.job_desc:
• Built backend services for Web Document using Laravel (PHP 8) and SQL Server, covering module architecture, RESTful routing, and standardized error handling.
  • Designed relational database schemas and migrations (keys, indexing, normalization) to ensure data consistency and efficient queries.
  • Implemented role-based access control (RBAC) with Laravel Policies and Middleware.
  • Collaborated with the frontend team (Blade/Tailwind) to align API contracts, UI states, and error messages; authored concise deployment SOPs and module docs.
  • Mentored on core Internet of Things (IoT) concepts: sensor/actuator basics, embedded programming, connectivity, and data pipelines.

Studied and explored the field of data science, focusing on data analysis and machine learning development using Python. Recently participated in and graduated from the Dicoding Bootcamp Batch 4 for Data Science and has been working on web-based machine learning projects as a main project. During the program, I worked on several projects, including a machine learning capstone project with a web-based output as the main deliverable of the model.


Details:

- Initiated ideas and developed the web-based application MarketMinder: Optimizing Store Operations Through Sales Forecasting

- Led, supervised, and collaborated with the team during the development of MarketMinder

- Built machine learning models using feature-based and time-series approaches for MarketMinder

- Developed the front-end of the website and integrated the back-end with the machine learning model for MarketMinder

relevant_work.job_desc:
• Performed network infrastructure maintenance (MDF, LAN, switches) to ensure stable connectivity across guest rooms, public areas, and meeting rooms.
  • Handled daily IT troubleshooting including internet connectivity, TV signal issues, printers, PCs, and file-sharing configurations across departments.
  • Installed and configured temporary LAN networks for large-scale events, including The Papandayan Jazz Fest 2025, ensuring zero downtime during high user traffic.
  • Conducted Quality of Service (QoS) testing using Command Prompt (ping, ipconfig) and nPerf to measure latency, download/upload speed, and network stability.
  • Designed UI/UX prototypes for an IT Helpdesk system (mobile & web) using Figma to digitalize incident reporting and tracking.
  • Developed a company profile website prototype using WordPress CMS, including theme customization, content structuring, and public hosting deployment.
  • Collaborated with IT teams and hotel staff to provide responsive technical support for operational systems.

  • Effectively communicated and provided technical training to teams within the organization in order to increase productivity and help ensure their solutions stayed current.

relevant_work.job_desc:
Pengalaman ini mencakup kegiatan akademik dan praktik kerja yang berfokus pada pengelolaan sistem informasi , analisis data, dan pengembangan aplikasi. Aktivitas dilakukan pada berbagai studi kasus termasuk pengolahan data aksara daerah dan dukungan sistem IT. Seluruh kegiatan menekankan ketelitian data, efisiensi sistem dan pemanfaatan teknologi.

Tugas & Pencapaian:

●    Mengolah dan menganalisis berbagai dataset menggunakan Python dan SQL untuk menghasilkan insight operasional.

●    Menyusun visualisasi dan laporan data menggunakan Matplotlib, Tableau, dan Power BI untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan.

●    Mendukung operasional sistem IT, termasuk pengecekan data, troubleshooting dasar, dan dokumentasi sistem.

●    Menerapkan konsep machine learning dasar untuk klasifikasi dan analisis data.

●    Menjaga akurasi dan konsistensi data melalui proses validasi dan data cleaning terstruktur.

Keahlian : Python, SQL, Data Analytics, Visualisasi Data, Sistem Informasi, Problem Solving

relevant_work.job_desc:
1. Membuat dan mengembangkan sistem internal untuk HR (PKWT, absensi, dan database karyawan)
2. Membuat dan mengembangkan sistem ticketing atau helpdesk
3. Membuat dan mengembangkan website company profile dan aplikasi web internal
4. Melakukan maintenance dan update sistem secara berkala
5. Melakukan instalasi, troubleshooting mikrotik dan jaringan (bandwidth management, wan connection, interconnection, VPN, Wi-Fi, LAN, Internet, firewall, manage network)
6. Mengelola dan memastikan seluruh infrastruktur IT di area/workshop berjalan optimal (PC, laptop, printer, CCTV, scanner, access door, access point, router, gps)
7. Melakukan testing, debugging, dan deployment aplikasi
8. Melakukan diagnosis dan penyelesaian gangguan hardware maupun software secara tepat waktu
9. Melakukan pengawasan dan pemeliharaan dasar keamanan IT, instalasi antivirus, dan penanganan malware ringan
10. Memberikan solusi teknis terhadap kebutuhan operasional perusahaan
11. Berkoordinasi dengan divisi lain untuk pengembangan fitur baru
12. Melakukan teknis remote & onsite (AnyDesk, TeamViewer)
